/nix/store/0j1ajvl2qwwb9n5a91hzd0j98fk9fa3k-gcc-wrapper-14.3.0/bin/gcc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/state.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/window.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/sprite_sheet.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/font.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/arcade.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/tile.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/keyboard.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/pawn.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/hud.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/item.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/item_inst.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/particles.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/item_stack.c.o CMakeFiles/talesofcoph.dir/src/menu.c.o -o talesofcoph  -lSDL2 -lm
